stemHtml: What is the role of the WAFC?

options.a: The World Area Forecast Centre is a meteorological centre designated to prepare and issue significant weather forecasts and upper-air forecasts.
options.b: The World Area Forecast Community is a meteorological centre designated to provide advisory information regarding the lateral and vertical extent and forecast movement of volcanic ash in the atmosphere.
options.c: The World Association Forecast Centre is a meteorological centre which also provides advisory information on the position, forecast direction and speed of movement of tropical cyclones.
options.d: The World Association Forecast Centre is a meteorological centre designated to prepare and issue significant weather forecasts only.
